issues.description: The string 'seller_admins.read' is hardcoded here and in apps/admin/src/features/users/presentation/pages/UserDetailPage.tsx (line 33). The SELLER_ADMINS_READ_PERMISSION constant was extracted to seller-admins/domain/constants.ts in cycle 3 but was NOT applied in these two consumer files.
issues.fix: Use the existing SELLER_ADMINS_READ_PERMISSION constant from '@/features/seller-admins/domain/constants' (studio) and define a similar constant in admin domain constants.

issues.description: The string 'seller_admins.read' appears as a local constant in this route file, duplicating the same value in studio domain constants and admin domain constants array (ALL_PERMISSION_KEYS). Within the admin app, a shared constant should be used.
issues.fix: Import the permission string from admin domain constants, or share through a well-placed admin shared constants file.

issues.description: The string 'seller_admins.read' also appears in the e2e session helper as a hardcoded string in a permissions array. This is a test file so lower severity, but it would benefit from referencing a shared constant.
issues.fix: E2E helpers may keep inline strings for readability (test code exception). Acceptable as-is per KISS.

patterns.description: PRODUCT_SEARCH_DEBOUNCE_MS extraction was correctly applied - the constant is defined once in products/domain/constants.ts and imported in ProductFilters.tsx. No other hardcoded 300ms debounce values found.
UUID_REGEX is defined once in apps/payments/src/shared/infrastructure/adminRestClient.ts and imported in orders/route.ts - no duplication found.
